metadata.description: Marketplace for claude-docs-creator — the .claude/ documentation authoring + validation toolkit.

plugins.name: docs-creator
plugins.description: Authoring, validation, and drift-detection for .claude/ docs in any project, plus automated frontend analysis optimized for downstream component-creation agents. Ships 15 api skills (init-project, create-docs, update-docs, validate-claude-docs, status, analyze-frontend, create-frontend-docs, update-frontend-docs, create-sequences, check-links, analyze-api-contracts, create-api-contracts-docs, update-api-contracts-docs, create-api-contract, menu), 12 agents, 10 rules, 6 hooks.
